author: Saher S.
pros: It has a core banking featuresIt has many features like hacli hpsp hprIt prints reports that helps in reviewing it easily and time efficientlyThe data is being processed in real time with ease of use and an accurate results Using this from a long time Value for money
cons: Sometimes it runs slow After updation it takes a lot of time to get into the new features as many new features are added at a time

description: Overall, it is easy to use, swift customer support, and very secure with the double factor authentication.
author: Chisimdi O.
pros: It is very easy to use, and as a banker, navigating the app never gave me any issues. The shortcut menu makes things very swift, I can get real time information about my clients, and with that I am able to assist them appropriately. The customer support is also very swift to respond in cases where there might be network downtime, the double factor authentication also makes it highly secure
cons: It can be very slow at times, and it doesn’t give history of more than two years back or less, so sometimes I have limited help to render to some clients for whom I may need to go that far back in order to assist them properly

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: This software is budget one and its not customization friendly and need to depend on priciple for most of the time.
cons: Customer support is not good and partner engagement magerns also not good.

author: Giuseppe M.
pros: Has been a reliable and efficient core banking solution for our bank. We are able to open account, manage portifolio, view account and manage accounts with precision. It also supports multiple currency with an updated currency convertor.
cons: With the many menu options, they can be confusing to first time user as they are not easy to master.

review_title: Our daily driver to help ICICI Bank customers
description: Finacle was a daily driver was all bank executives at ICICI and we relied on it to keep the customers happy with their banking needs
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Finacle is a great core banking solution built by Infosys which supports Online Banking,Multi-Branch,Transaction Monitoring and reporting, mutual funds, credit cards, customer profiles, etc. As a banking executive in ICICI, I used it on daily basis to help customers with their banking needs.
cons: Turn around time for any new features request was time consuming. Improvements can be also made in simplifying the overall UI of the solution as well.

description: My overall experience with the Finacle is excellent. It helps to increase the performance of bank, as well as my personal performance in my career as a banker. Great product.
author: Asantha U.
pros: Two years ago our bank migrated to Finacle from another core banking system. When compare the performance is really high. And it is so efficient and helps to make office mates competent. This is really important to our bank as an organization.
cons: We have faced some difficulties in data extraction and conversion process of our old core banking system. But is not an issue of Finacle.

description: Awesome experience, high level of security and very user friendly.
author: Bwalya M.
pros: Very user friendly which made training new users a breeze.
cons: It may be considered expensive by some businesses, However it is absolutely worth it.

author: Sandeep G.
pros: It covers all core banking solutions at one place. It has very rich features.
cons: Menus are very lengthy. Some menus are opened in new window which should be opened in same window. Some menus has to opened again after entering one entry. It doesn't cover ATM Mangament

description: Stable core banking system that supports innovation
author: Moses K.
pros: Finacle offers an open architecture and allows integration with other applications and platforms allowing delivery of innovative solutions
cons: Requires a lot of customization to be able to meet business functionalities. Support can also be difficult owing to geographical differences and sometimes language barriers

author: James E.
pros: Display wrong Account number if is not correct when entry
cons: No significant signature like,no sequence for individual, only display multiple entries sequence

description: Superb experience,after using this i always suggest everybody to purchase and use this software
author: Bharat A.
pros: Its superb features and transaction monitoring and mainly user transactiin security
cons: Its nothing like least , every thing is good but it takes little time to login but its good for security too

review_title: Is there a better one than this? not cheap to tell
description: Due high costs of implementing such systems, you can involuntarily often conclude you have the best at hand
author: patrick N.
pros: Finacle core banking solution is a highly customizable banking platform. From an active front and back office user experience, I can attest to its ability to categorize many users with different levels of functions and user rights with high level of audit trails and reports generation. It offers great inter branch interactions while maintaining the right levels of separations and authorizations.
cons: Meaningful customization as use as intended meaning putting a lot of hour in training and often seemed complicated especially for first time users.

review_title: The tool simplifies Core Banking - Its a product to watch
author: John K.
pros: With the tool, it makes the core banking easier since it comes with multiple menu option which makes it easier to perform all the financial task. When it comes to security, you are able to administer rights and privalleges to different level of staffs depending on the task at hand. Using the tool you are sure that you will score 101% when it comes to compliance and financial management and tracking.
cons: As an easy tool to use, I have nothing against the tool

description: Finacle software was able to do what we expected and provide the solutions we needed within our environment.
author: Teresa F.
pros: This software was easy to navigate through and learn how to use. There were hardly any glitches and when we did have any issues, our in-house tech professional was well-trained and was able to assist or sort out any problems swiftly.
cons: I have no issues with this software. In the banking industry, reliable software is vital to any financial institution's operations. This software was reliable and functioned well in our work environment.

review_title: Finacle the Savior for Finance Business
description: I have used this Software for over a year and so far it is good.
author: Elliot Osazuwa U.
pros: Finacle has a nice user friendly interface, its fast and it organizes data in a very simplified manner.
cons: Personally the only challenge with finacle is the cost of purchase which is quite expensive to the Lower and middle class businesses.

description: Serving customer was made easy as this is our major core banking system, integration with mobile money services has even made customer service much simpler and faster.
author: Stephen S.
pros: Finacle is a 360 software that offers core banking capabilities, integration with other systems is very possible and it has a highly secure environment.
cons: One area of improvement I would recommend is centered around timely updates so as enable customers experience additional features.

review_title: One of the best in the Industry
description: I had a great experience with this Software and would highly recommend it those who are considering to make a change for their banking organisation.
author: Sunaina K.
pros: It is easy to use and anyone in the organisation can master the functionalities with practice. It is fast, reliable and gets the work done!
cons: Customisation can be challenging. Also, it would be great if we can integrate it with other banking software that we use so that it can save us time in import and export of data.

review_title: Looking for Treasury Management System? Check this out.
description: Overall process from planning to go production support handover was smooth and well organized. Superb team on site as well as from India to cater the exact client requirement.
author: Kaushal D.
pros: The system is fully configurable by use of system level as well as user level built in parameters. In Addition, new parameter creation, script level function handling can be done to best fit the customer requirements. Integrations with leading trading platforms such as Reuters, Bloomberg, TradeSTP etc is available in the base product.
cons: The web services are not support in v11. Tool has to be installed in each end user PC.

description: It was very nice to work and easy of working. even a fresher to a banking system can be learn easily
author: gihan A.
pros: it is a very user friendly system which has lots of options.
cons: All the features are very useful since i don't have such feeling

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: It is a simple application to use and it allows banks to launch new products and services in less time, to gain a significant return on transformation investments.
cons: Sometimes it takes a long time to process and submit a request.

description: Definitily can be better, but for the thing i do is enough the way it is.
author: Selene A.
pros: When i need to see reports of trade, it's helpful to analyze the behavior of the clients.
cons: It's difficult to understand the languague of the commands, definitly you have to memorized all or look the manual.

description: This is user friendly for experts, for new users they can use master path, I learnt many think in finacle in banking sector, I'm very satisfied with this software.
author: Pradeep B.
pros: Master path is very good, very help for viewing account details, we can see and operate the account very easily.
cons: Date changing option we don't no, how to authorize the cases, what is is use of date changing option we are not aware.

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Mobile Banking Internet Banking Ease of Use Retail Banking features
cons: Implementation & Customization is tougher.

description: I have worked on Finacle for the brief period of 8 months for one of the biggest bank of India for their retail banking arms. Finacle is a great product in terms of Retail banking for service and product innovation for retail banking. Finacle is configurable in a great way and it's feature rich for Online Banking, Customer Management. Finacle technical support is outstanding and response time from Support team was phenomenal and professional to the core. For Developer this product suite requires extensive learning curve and cost and Training is provided by Product owner organization.
author: Alpeshkumar G.
Pratul S.
pros: Great product easily customizable and easy to use
cons: While this product is great it can be made more customizable and easy to integrate with other products.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
